Off Calendar May-15-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JEFFREY MALAN's Motion To Dismiss.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion "for dismissal of class action pursuant to California Rules of Court, Rule 3.770" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
